hero.desc: Java/Spring Boot specialist crafting fintech solutions. Focused on clean architecture and high-performance APIs.
whoami.title: WHO AM I?
whoami.p1: Hello! I'm Alberto Plaza Montes, a 23-year-old computer engineer from Spain.
whoami.p2: I'm currently pursuing my Master's degree while working in the FinTech sector as both a Backend Developer and Software Architect.
whoami.p3: In my free time, I'm passionate about personal projects ranging from Minecraft server plugins to prototyping new FinTech ideas and similar ventures.
whoami.p4: I'm always learning and seeking new challenges that help me grow both professionally and personally.
tech.title: Tech Stack
resume.title: Resume Preview
projects.selection: A selection of my favorite work
projects.some: Some of the projects I've worked on
projects.p1.desc: A self-hosted Spring Boot REST API built with Kotlin to generate parameterizable pseudo-random number sequences across various statistical distributions.
projects.p2.desc: Minecraft server plugin & library for creating programmable structures by layers.
projects.p3.desc: A high-performance Java 21 JSON navigator that operates directly on off-heap memory using bit-packed primitive pointers via Project Panama.
projects.p4.desc: Minecraft server plugin for a global trade shop system.
projects.p5.desc: My own blockchain implementation in Java.
projects.p6.desc: Minecraft server plugin to recreate One Piece abilities.
projects.p7.desc: A Minecraft server plugin that randomizes critical hits and their particle effects.
contact.title: Contact me!
contact.p1: Feel free to reach out for collaborations or just to say hello!
contact.p2: I'm particularly interested in fintech projects and open-source contributions.
timeline.t1.title: M.Sc. in Computer Science & Engineering
timeline.t1.desc: Specialization in Software Engineering. Projects in web development, algorithms, and data structures. Graduated with solid foundations in computer science.
timeline.t2.title: Software Engineer at Keifi by Izertis
timeline.t2.desc: Building & designing scalable microservices and REST APIs using Java and Spring Boot with a DDD architecture. Building CI/CD pipelines with Jenkins and Docker. Collaborating with cross-functional teams to deliver high-quality software solutions.
timeline.t3.title: Software Engineer Intern at Keifi Technologies
timeline.t3.desc: Developed microservices using Java and Spring Boot & built UX/UI using Angular for financial clients. Integrated external systems, built REST APIs, and worked with CI/CD tools like Jenkins and Docker.
timeline.t4.title: B.Sc. in Computer Science & Engineering
timeline.t4.desc: Studied core topics in computer science and engineering, including mathematics, algorithms, and systems design. Built strong programming skills in Java, Python, and C++. Gained experience in teamwork and communication through group projects and presentations. Specialized in Information Systems and database management.

privpol.title: PRIVACY POLICY
privpol.intro: This Privacy Policy explains how I handle your personal information when you interact with my portfolio website and any associated services. As an independent developer, I'm committed to protecting your privacy rights.

This Privacy Policy explains how I handle your personal information when you interact with my portfolio website and any associated services. As an independent developer, I'm committed to protecting your privacy rights.
privpol.terms.title: Key Terms
privpol.terms.portfolio: Portfolio refers to my personal developer portfolio website.
privpol.terms.me: I/Me/My refers to Alberto Plaza Montes, the owner of this portfolio.
privpol.terms.you: You/Your means visitors to my portfolio or users of my demo applications.
privpol.terms.demos: Demo Applications are interactive projects I may showcase that collect user input.
privpol.terms.cookies: Cookies are small files placed on your device to enhance experience.
privpol.collection.title: Data Collection
privpol.collection.desc: My portfolio is designed to minimize data collection. Any information gathered falls into these categories:
privpol.collection.vol: Voluntary Information: Data you provide through contact forms or demo applications
privpol.collection.auto: Automatic Information: Basic analytics via GitHub Pages (IP address, browser type)
privpol.collection.cook: Cookies: Only for essential functionality in demo projects
privpol.tracking.title: Tracking Technologies
privpol.tracking.desc: I use minimal tracking only where necessary for demo applications:
privpol.tracking.c1.title: Essential Cookies
privpol.tracking.c2.title: Session Storage
privpol.tracking.c2.desc: Temporary data for your current visit
privpol.use.title: Use of Information
privpol.use.desc: Any collected data is used exclusively for:
privpol.use.f1: Portfolio Functionality: Operating demo applications and interactive elements
privpol.use.f2: Communication: Responding to your inquiries if you contact me
privpol.use.f3: Improvements: Understanding how visitors use my portfolio to enhance it
privpol.use.important: Important: I don't sell, trade, or monetize your data in any way. This portfolio has no advertising or third-party tracking.
privpol.security.title: Data Security
privpol.security.desc: I implement reasonable security measures appropriate for a personal portfolio:
privpol.security.s1: HTTPS encryption for all data transmission
privpol.security.note: Note: As this is hosted on GitHub Pages, please also review
privpol.third.title: Third-Party Services
privpol.third.end: These services have their own privacy policies which I recommend reviewing.
privpol.rights.title: Your Rights
privpol.rights.r1: Request details about data I may have about you
privpol.rights.r2: Ask for deletion of any personal information
privpol.rights.r3: Disable cookies in your browser settings
privpol.updates.title: Policy Updates
privpol.updates.desc: I may update this policy occasionally. The "Last updated" date at the top will reflect changes.
privpol.contact.title: Contact Me
